Index.title: International Logistics and Freight Forwarding
Index.heroSubtitle: Modern transport solutions and highest standard logistics since 1998.
Index.servicesSubtitle: We provide a complete supply chain from pickup point to customs clearance and safe final delivery.
Index.service1Desc: Full (FTL) and partial (LTL) truck loads across Europe with modern EURO-6 trucks. We specialize in ADR and temperature-controlled freight.
Index.service2Desc: Full customs broker service (EX, IM, T1). Preparation of export/import declarations and customs codes (HS/TN VED).
Index.service3Desc: Multimodal transport (FCL/LCL) for intercontinental shipments and consolidated logistics for fast solutions.

Services.title: Dangerous Goods (ADR) Transport
Services.adr1Desc: We transport all 9 hazard classes, including flammables and chemicals.
Services.adr2Desc: Our drivers hold international ADR certificates and vast safe-driving records.
Services.adr3Desc: Customized tanks and regular tech inspections to meet ADR requirements.
Services.adr4Desc: In addition to CMR, we offer specialized risk coverage policies.
Services.adr5Desc: Handling complex routing and TN VED / HS code processing.
Services.adr6Desc: Calculate your ADR transport costs instantly.
Services.other1: Road Freight in Europe (EURO-6, MEGA trailers)
Services.other3: Warehousing and customs warehouse services in Adazi

About.baseDesc: Muizas street 11 and 11a. Strategically advantageous perimeter with a closed warehouse and guarded parking for the DAF truck fleet.
About.expP1: "PORTMANNS UN KO" Ltd. is one of the most experienced international freight forwarding companies in Latvia.
About.expP2: We have developed a stable cooperation network throughout Europe, specializing in dangerous (ADR) goods, oversized cargo, and providing full customs warehouse support on the East-West route.
About.certsSubtitle: We work in accordance with the highest industry standards and Cefic (EFTCO) guidelines for chemical transport.
About.cmrDesc: Standard CMR policy for every shipment and additional cargo coverage for special values.
About.sqasDesc: Safety and Quality Assessment for Sustainability – guaranteed safety in chemical circulation.
About.isoDesc: Quality management system certificate for global logistics processes.
